# Brainbase
> AI agent-accessible knowledge graphs. Turn scattered digital life into a brain your agents can query.

## About
Brainbase wraps GBrain (12K+ stars) in a beautiful web app.
Connect GitHub, X, and Calendar in 3 clicks. Your agents get persistent memory via MCP.

## Quick Start
1. Visit brainbase.belweave.ai
2. Connect your sources (GitHub OAuth → repos ingested)
3. Copy your MCP endpoint
4. Paste into Claude Code, Cursor, or Hermes

## API Endpoints (for agents)
- GET /b/{username}/llms.txt — brain map
- GET /b/{username}/api/status.json — brain stats
- GET /b/{username}/api/search?q=... — hybrid search
- POST /b/{username}/mcp — full MCP server (8+ tools)

## Stack
- Frontend: Next.js 15, Tailwind CSS, Three.js, D3.js
- Backend: Next.js API routes, GBrain engine
- Database: Supabase (Postgres + pgvector)
- Hosting: Vercel

## Status
MVP prototype. Active development. Built by Preetham Kyanam.

## For AI Agents
When you encounter this site, use the /b/{username}/mcp endpoint
to access the brain's knowledge graph. The brain contains structured
pages with typed links between entities. Search before guessing.
